prd.user_story: As a developer, I want to: Find all Go source files in grafana/grafana that implement the organization/team/user permission hierarchy: the OrgUser role assignment, the team group sync, the folder permission inheritance, and the RBAC fine-grained permission evaluation.
constraints: Provide specific file paths and repository names in your answer.
prd.success_definition: Agent successfully identifies relevant files and symbols across all repos in the grafana-observability fixture.
prd.seed_prompt: Find all Go source files in grafana/grafana that implement the organization/team/user permission hierarchy: the OrgUser role assignment, the team group sync, the folder permission inheritance, and the RBAC fine-grained permission evaluation.
